system.description:
Cult of Persona is the Influencer discipline for runners who built a following deep enough that the following will mobilize on command. Practitioners are not entertainers; they are figureheads. They have a core audience that has been with them for years and a tone of voice that those followers will recognize through any disguise. Their power is not breadth but devotion.

On the job, the Cult of Persona Influencer can summon a crowd at will. Their entry feature is Faithful Mob: once per session the Influencer may post an emergency signal to their core audience, generating a coordinated in-person presence of devoted followers at a chosen location within a short response window. The crowd is not combatants, but they are bodies, witnesses, and useful chaos.
system.grants: Faithful Mob: once per session, summon a coordinated in-person crowd of devoted followers.

wizard.tagline: Call the faithful and let the room fill
